creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
I approve the patch, with the exception of the README.html file that was being 
placed into the port's root directory.  I would have had this updated myself, 
but I have not had the time to really look into some issues I had with my own 
attempt to get this converted to using the ports system's CMake structure.

Thanks,
Naram Qashat
